div.head:
NSC0021 - June 07, 1989 - Strategic Arms Reduction Talks, Defense Policy, Space IssuesSource: George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSC Meetings Files, OA/ID 90001-006, NSC0021-June 07, 1989-Strategic Arms Reduction Talks, Defense Policy, Space Issues. Secret. Sent for action. Sent through Kanter.
Source: George H.W. Bush Library, Bush Presidential Records, National Security Council, H-Files, NSC Meetings Files, OA/ID 90001-006, NSC0021-June 07, 1989-Strategic Arms Reduction Talks, Defense Policy, Space Issues. Secret. Copied to Quayle and Sununu. A stamped notation indicates Bush saw the memorandum on June 7. According to the President's Daily Diary, Bush presided over a meeting of the National Security Council in the Cabinet Room on June 7, lasting from 10:51-11:50 a.m. No minutes were found.
div.p: SECRED RECORD ID#6S2057q=e0"" anomie NSC/S PROFILE RECEIVED: 05 JUN 89 09 TO: PRESIDENT | FROM: SCOWCROFT DOC DATE: 06 JUN 89 | SOURCE REF: KEYWORDS: START DEFENSE POLICY SPACE POLICY NSC SYSTEM AGENDA NSR PERSONS:; SUBJECT: PRES TALKERS FOR NSC MTG ON 7 JUN RE START & DEFENSE | ee. ee ACTION: NOTED BY PRES DUE DATE: 27 MAR 90 STATUS: C FILE ~ $0021 SRO014 CODES: nel > Se DoS BUTION 'OR ACTION FOR CONCURRENCE FOR INFO DAVIS KANTER TOBEY White House Guidelines E.0. 12958, SEC 3.4 (B) September 11, 2006 By caP__ NARA, Date 9/8/07 COMMENTS: DISPATCHED BY DATE BY HAND W/ATTCH OPENED BY: AC CLOSED BY: AC DOC 30F 4 SEERET

COMMENTS NSE eae Kitemo ~ WSe-1Y ~ [> 1. 48-700
. THE WHITE HOUSE - So WASHINGTON 7 | "e "4 L: Cause / i fee / OF

PARTICIPANTS | The President ! The Vice President Secretary of State Secretary of Treasury Secretary of Defense Secretary of Energy Director, Office of Management and Budget Chief of Staff to the President Assistant to the President for National Security Affairs Director of Central Intelligence | Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff . Deputy Assistant to the President for National Security Affairs Director, Arms Control and Disarmament Agency Head of Delegation, Nuclear and Space Talks.

SECRET RECORD GDMGSI0S7E Ne NSC/S PROFILE RECEIVED: 05 JUN 89 09 TO: AGENCIES FROM: HUGHES DOC DATE: 05 JUN 89 SOURCE REF: KEYWORDS: START DEFENSE POLICY SPACE POLICY NSC SYSTEM AGENDA NSR PERSONS: SUBJECT: NOTIFICATION OF NSC MIG 7 JUN RE START & DEFENSE ACTION: HUGHES SGD MEMO TO AGENCIES DUE DATE: 27 MAR 90 STATUS: C | STAFF OFFICER: TOBEY a, LOGREF: 8920407 8920455 itm oY NSCP: Nso02 SROO14 CODES: FOR ACTION FOR CONCURRENCE FOR_INFO KANTER TOBEY White House Guidelines E.O. 12958, SEC 3.4 (B) September 11, 2006 . :: KBK 5/9/89 THE WHITE HOUSE --. oe) 8 O46 5 us WASHINGTON WON? -- REVISED." MEMO! DUM ia | TO: General Scowcroft FROM: JOSEPH W. HAGIN SUBJECT: APPROVED PRESIDENTIAL ACTIVITY EVENT: NSC Meeting REVISED, DATE: June 7, 1989 o! | TIME: rte-pm. BESprt WESEM. 1D Usa DURATION: JS 6% minutes a | LOCATION: Cabinet Room REVISED. oi ATTIRE: Business Suit at Lge REMARKS REQUIRED: No a MEDIA COVERAGE: Closed FIRST LADY PARTICIPATION: No; ADDITIONAL INFORMATION: CONTACT: TELEPHONE: OFFICE HOME NOTE: PROJECT OFFICER, SEE ATTACHED CHECKLIST Ed Rogers Marlin Fitzwater David Bates James Cicconi David Demarest David Valdez Fred McClure Jean Lamb USSS - PPD Susan Porter Rose - Steve Studdert Gary Walters Patty Presock John Keller WHCA Audio/Visual Chriss Winston Tim McBride WHCA Operations Laurie Firestone J. ' > KBK 5/9/89 pee THE WHITE HOUSE ¥ WASHINGTON ADNSE MEMORANDUM TO: General Scowcroft FROM: JOSEPH W. HAGIN SUBJECT: APPROVED PRESIDENTIAL ACTIVITY EVENT: NSC Meeting DATE: June 7, 1989 TIME: 3:00 p.m. DURATION: 60 minutes LOCATION: Cabinet Room ATTIRE: Business Suit REMARKS REQUIRED: No MEDIA COVERAGE: Closed FIRST LADY PARTICIPATION: No ADDITIONAL INFORMATION: CONTACT: TELEPHONE: OFFICE HOME NOTE: PROJECT OFFICER, SEE ATTACHED CHECKLIST Ed Rogers Marlin Fitzwater David Bates James Cicconi David Demarest David Valdez Fred McClure Jean Lamb USSS - PPD Susan Porter Rose Steve Studdert Gary Walters Patty Presock John Keller WHCA Audio/Visual Chriss Winston Tim McBride WHCA Operations Laurie Firestone J.
